header.tooltipSourceInfo:
ntc-templates: An open-source TextFSM template library for network devices, led by {'@'}networktocode
Elinpf: A fork of ntc-templates, maintained by {'@'}Elinpf with templates for major Chinese vendors

The two sources differ in the number of supported templates and specific template content. Choose or modify based on your needs
header.tooltipGithubInfo:
- This site supports self-hosting. See: GitHub, Gitee
- Dividers between editor panes are draggable and double-clickable
share.alertText: Share links are for temporary storage only. Anyone with the link can view or update the content. Do not share with untrusted users.
share.optionDesc: You are viewing a shared link. Choose an action:
share.updateBtn: Update current link (overwrite content · extend 7 days)
share.createBtn: Create new link (generate a brand-new link)
tour.layoutDesc: Toggle between horizontal and vertical split-pane layouts
tour.wrapDesc: Toggle editor word wrap; when off, long lines scroll horizontally
tour.fontSizeDesc: Click the number to edit, or use +/- buttons to adjust
tour.shareDesc: Generate a temporary share link to share your template and parsed results
shareStore.errorNotFound: Share link not found or expired
shareStore.errorCreate: Failed to create share link, please retry
